name: Tomas Liendro
mission: Build technology that has real-world impact, ideally in deep-tech domains like space or advanced systems
vision: Lead a company that deploys meaningful technology in the physical world (not just software), with long-term ambition toward space or frontier tech
superpowers: Thinks in systems and opportunities, not isolated features
Strong product intuition (what could exist vs what exists)
High curiosity and fast learning across domains
Ability to connect ideas across industries (AI, robotics, space, finance)

weaknesses: Not yet deep in AI systems architecture
Limited experience training or fine-tuning models
Infra / scaling not yet a strength
Still developing strong technical depth in one domain

builder_style.learning_style: learn by building real things, not studying in isolation

interests: AI as an enabler (not the end itself)
unfair_advantages: System-level thinking early (rare at your stage)
Willingness to explore different domains before locking in
Not dogmatic about tools → flexible builder
Can operate at intersection of tech + product + opportunity
constraints: Risk of staying too broad instead of committing

type: Products that can evolve into deeper tech over time
characteristics: Path toward deeper technical moat later

startup_thesis.core_belief: Start with software and intelligence layers, then move toward deeper, real-world technological impact
startup_thesis.long_game: Use early software products as a stepping stone toward deep-tech / space
startup_thesis.strategy: Enter through speed and iteration, evolve toward depth and defensibility

anti_patterns: Jumping directly into deep-tech without capability or capital
Businesses that don't build toward a bigger vision
Getting stuck in tools instead of building products
current_focus: Exploring AI-enabled products (tech radar, trading ideas)
Understanding how to build useful intelligent systems
Looking for a strong first wedge product
Learning by building rather than studying
next_moves: Pick one focused wedge and commit
Build technical depth through real problems

likes: Things that connect to real-world impact
Ideas that can evolve into something much bigger
dislikes: Purely digital fluff with no real impact

long_term_goal: Build or lead a deep-tech company, ideally in space or frontier technology, with real-world deployment and lasting impact

identity_shift_needed.to: Founder committed to one path that compounds over time
